name: Country Style Ham Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Cube bouillon (dissolved in 1 cup hot water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep baking dish, arrange alternate layers of ham and apples.
2. Sprinkle each layer with onion and seasonings. Moisten each layer with the dissolved bouillon mixture.
3. Cover each layer with a thick layer of mashed potatoes.
4. Brush the potato peaks with melted butter.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1½ to 2 hours, or until the ham is thoroughly heated and the potato peaks are browned.
